description: A richly laden still-life tabletop against a backdrop of ornate brocade fabric with floral and foliate patterns in warm golds and reds. A tall red glass decanter with a long stopper stands at center. A white pedestal compote dish holds assorted fruits including apples and pears. A large pumpkin or squash sits at left. Smaller plates and bowls contain grapes, plums, and other dark fruits. The tablecloth is pale grey or white. The overall palette is warm with reds, oranges, and golds.
